titles.title: pedon: A Python package for analyzing unsaturated soil hydraulic properties

institution.institution_name: Department of Water Management, Faculty of Civil Engineering and Geosciences, Delft University of Technology, Delft, South Holland, The Netherlands
Artesia B.V., Schoonhoven, South Holland, The Netherlands
Federal Institute for Geosciences and Natural Resources (BGR), Hannover, Lower Saxony, Germany
